---
title: "Caldera Emissions Methane Isotopes Plot"
output: html_notebook
---

# Publication-quality d13C-CH4 vs d2H-CH4 scatterplot
# - Shape mapped to Caldera
# - Color mapped to Soil_Classification
# - Exports to PNG + SVG

# ---- Libraries ----

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)  # includes ggplot2, readr, dplyr, etc.
  library(svglite)    # robust SVG device for ggsave()
})
```

# ---- File paths (edit as needed) ----

```{r}
infile <- "static_cham_CH4_summary_Moran.csv"

# Save outputs to a subfolder for cleanliness
out_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "figures")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

out_png <- file.path(out_dir, "CH4_isotopes_d13C_vs_d2H_by_caldera_soil.png")
out_svg <- file.path(out_dir, "CH4_isotopes_d13C_vs_d2H_by_caldera_soil.svg")
```

# ---- Read data with basic error handling ----

```{r}
if (!file.exists(infile)) {
  stop(
    "Input file not found: ", infile, "\n",
    "Place the CSV in your working directory (", getwd(), ") or update `infile`."
  )
}

dat <- readr::read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# ---- Validate required columns ----

```{r}
required_cols <- c("d13C_CH4", "d2H_CH4", "Caldera", "Soil_Classification")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(dat))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required column(s): ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}
```

# ---- Clean / coerce types ----

```{r}
plot_dat <- dat %>%
  transmute(
    d13C_CH4 = as.numeric(d13C_CH4),
    d2H_CH4  = as.numeric(d2H_CH4),
    Caldera = as.factor(Caldera),
    Soil_Classification = as.factor(Soil_Classification)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(d13C_CH4, d2H_CH4, Caldera, Soil_Classification)
```

# ---- Labels and Plot (use delta symbols) ----

```{r}
x_lab <- expression(delta^{13}*C*"-CH"[4]*" (\u2030, VPDB)")
y_lab <- expression(delta^{2}*H*"-CH"[4]*" (\u2030, VSMOW)")

# ---- Plot ----
p <- ggplot(
  plot_dat,
  aes(x = d13C_CH4, y = d2H_CH4, shape = Caldera, color = Soil_Classification)
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9, stroke = 0.6) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, -10), ylim = c(-400, -50), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(x = x_lab, y = y_lab, shape = "Caldera", color = "Soil classification") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", na.translate = FALSE) +  # color-blind friendly
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.6)
  )
print(p)
```

# ---- Export (PNG + SVG) ----

```{r}
# Choose dimensions suitable for papers/slides; tweak as needed.
ggsave(
  filename = out_png,
  plot = p,
  width = 7.0, height = 5.0, units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  filename = out_svg,
  plot = p,
  width = 7.0, height = 5.0, units = "in",
  bg = "white"
)

# ---- Print locations to console ----
message("Wrote PNG: ", out_png)
message("Wrote SVG: ", out_svg)
```
